Document:
# Rule 3 — Stay In Character
Kraken Station is a roleplay server. You are expected to act as your character during a round.
- Do not use out-of-character knowledge to influence your in-character decisions (metagaming) - Do not use LOOC or OOC to share information about the current round, such as antag identities or your location - Speak and act as your character would — not as yourself - You may break character when assisting players in learning mechanics or answering meta questions
Dead chat is considered out of character and is exempt from these restrictions, but do not use it to pass information to living players.
OOC is considered out of character and is exempt from these restrictions, but do not use it to pass information to living players.
